nasb.text: It was now about the sixth hour, and darkness fell over the whole land until the ninth hour,

esv.text: It was now about the sixth hour, and there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour,

cnv.text: 從大約正午直到下午三點鐘，遍地都黑暗了。

ccb.text: 那时大约是正午，黑暗笼罩着整个大地，一直到下午三点，

csbs.text: 那时大约是中午十二点，黑暗笼罩了整个大地，一直到下午三点。
